claims.evidence_text: Most of the estimated values are in the range of 235–275 tillers/m2; values of 240–270 tillers/m2 correspond to about 160,000–180,000 tillers per acre
claims.claim_summary: Estimated winter wheat overwintering tiller density mostly 235–275 tillers/m2 at the Xiongan site.
claims.methods: Remote sensing (UAV hyperspectral and Sentinel-2 multispectral) with machine-learning (RF/GBRT) regression on vegetation indices; ground truth from manual counting in 0.5 m x 0.5 m quadrats

claims.evidence_text: values of 240–270 tillers/m2 correspond to about 160,000–180,000 tillers per acre, which is in agreement with the 120,000–180,000 tillers per acre used when sowing
claims.claim_summary: Target/sowing winter wheat tiller density is 120,000–180,000 tillers per acre.
